items.title: Trump says he 'wasn't worried' during Washington press dinner shooting
items.summary: CBS News, the BBC's US partner, reports the suspect wrote a document saying he wanted to target Trump administration officials. He is due in court on Monday.

items.title: I was in the room with Trump and heard the low thudding sound of gunfire
items.summary: The BBC's Gary O'Donoghue describes the moment he and others dived for cover as shots rang out at the venue.

items.title: Trump cancels US envoys' trip to Pakistan for talks on Iran war
items.summary: Iran had earlier said there were no plans for a direct meeting with a US delegation led by Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 「看不見的國家」巴西放映 民主自由感動僑胞與網紅
items.summary: 南美三國巴拉圭、阿根廷、巴西串連，四月份接力放映「看不見的國家紀錄片」。由巴西台灣同鄉會主辦、巴西台灣文化協會（ICBT）協辦的壓軸場，25日假聖保羅僑教中心放映，吸引...…

items.title: 日本國道巴士驚傳歹徒持刀 警方衝進車內逮人
items.summary: 日本26日晚間從東京車站出發開往山口縣萩市的高速公路巴士，今（27日）清晨5時25分許駛至廣島縣時驚傳有乘客持刀，警方獲報後衝入車內逮人。  綜合日媒報導，這輛巴士開到廣島縣...…

items.title: 白宮晚宴槍手鎖定川普內閣！歐巴馬發聲 籲美國人拒絕暴力
items.summary: 美國白宮記者協會美東時間25日舉行晚宴，期間驚傳槍響，總統川普（Donald Trump）等人緊急撤離現場，隨後嫌犯當場被捕。前總統歐巴馬（Barack Obama）26日呼籲美...…
